ogTitle: Horsley Park vs Hovells Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horsley Park and Hovells Creek.
heading: Horsley Park vs Hovells Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horsley Park, New South Wales and Hovells Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Horsley Park and Hovells Creek have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Horsley Park or Hovells Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horsley Park has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Hovells Creek scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horsley Park scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Hovells Creek scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horsley Park or Hovells Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Horsley Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
